title: Evangelion merchandise
wikitext:
== Headline text ==
Bizarre Evangelion Merchandise and Promotional Items PLEASE NOTE: THIS PAGE IS UNDER CONSTRUCTION! IT IS BY NO MEANS FINISHED!!!
Of course, you can buy just about anything on the internets. This goes without saying. There is the Eva store, and they have an wide array of products to tempt otakus ... if you can read Japanese. Maybe you have some kind of translator program on your machine, or a Babel fish, but I don't. Then there's Amazon. You can buy some pretty strange things there. I'm just going to skip most of that. If you want dakimakura, they have plenty. I'm not going to list them here.


== Headline text ==
Hello Kitty synchronized with Evangelion
'''Toasters'''
'''Pouch or pencil case'''
'''Cell straps and cell phone cases'''
'''Clothing items''' (incl. underwear)
'''Bento boxes'''
'''Plushies'''
'''Notepads'''
'''Watches'''
'''Keychains'''
'''Tote bags'''
'''Throw pillows'''
'''Bath towels'''



== Headline text ==
Food and utensils
'''Cake'''
'''Ramen'''
'''Beer'''
'''Chopsticks'''


== Headline text ==
Other
